title: pimpinella thellungiana var. thellungiana
intro: Pimpinella thellungiana var. thellungiana is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the Himalayan region. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Pimpinella thellungiana var. thellungiana can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its health benefits.
